---
title: Teaching
listing:
    - id: courses
      contents:
        - courses/uva-cps1-cpste/*.qmd
        - courses/uva-cs6501-wsiot/*.qmd
        - courses/uva-csece4501-wiot/*.qmd
      type: default
      fields: [image, date, title]
      sort:
        - "date desc"
      page-size: 100
      categories: true
      sort-ui: true
      filter-ui: true
date-format: "MMM, YYYY"
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---
